IBRAHIM OLAWALE

Full Stack Developer | React, Django, JavaScript, Python
Lagos, Nigeria | +234 909 108 2232 | ibrahimolawale580@gmail.com | GitHub | LinkedIn

SUMMARY

Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience developing production-grade applications using React, Django, JavaScript, and Python. Designed scalable frontends and resilient backend systems for data-heavy platforms serving over 1,000 users. Built ETL pipelines, integrated third-party APIs, and developed tools supporting business-critical workflows. Launched features from concept to release, partnered with cross-functional teams, and enhanced performance—cutting page load times by 40%. Wrote maintainable, well-tested code with modular architecture, leading to a 30% reduction in technical debt. Translates complex business needs into robust technical solutions across dashboards, data visualizations, async processing, and AI-enabled tools.

SKILLS

React.js, Tailwind CSS, Django, Javascript, CSS, Typescript, PostgreSQL, HTML5, Django Rest Framework, Node.js, APIs, Redux, Bootstrap, CSS3, Agile, Selenium

EXPERIENCE

Adroit Solutions Ltd – Remote

Full Stack Developer

March 2023 – Present

  • Spearheaded frontend efforts for 4+ mission-critical web apps using React, TailwindCSS, and Bootstrap, boosting user engagement by 25% and reducing loading time by 45%.
  • Created and maintained 15+ REST APIs with Django and DRF, powering over 100,000 API requests monthly across internal systems.
  • Designed real-time transaction features using Server-Sent Events (SSE), ensuring seamless sync for 10,000+ concurrent users and cutting latency by 60%.
  • Converted 50+ Figma wireframes into responsive, optimized UI components—decreasing bounce rates by 30% and improving session duration by 45%.
  • Developed a scalable React component library that accelerated feature delivery by 30% and simplified maintenance across codebases.
  • Tuned PostgreSQL and MySQL queries, resulting in 40% faster response times and 99.99% database uptime.
  • Contributed 12+ story points per Agile sprint and played a key role in 6 major product releases over 12 months.
  • Trained and mentored 5+ junior developers and interns—cutting onboarding time by half and improving team productivity by 35%.
  • Led a team of 4 engineers, conducting code reviews and sprint retrospectives that increased sprint velocity by 25%.

Freelance Software Developer – Remote

Full Stack Developer

January 2021 – February 2023

  • Launched 5+ cross-platform apps, collectively used by 20,000+ users—boosting workflow efficiency for clients by 35%.
  • Delivered tailored business solutions for 6+ SMEs using React and Django, automating processes and cutting manual work by 40%.
  • Engineered a C#-based internal document search tool with fast indexing—achieving sub-300ms response times on large datasets.
  • Integrated secure third-party services (e.g., payments, analytics) with APIs that maintained 99.9% uptime and met data privacy standards.
  • Created pixel-perfect, responsive UIs that raised user satisfaction scores by 25% and halved design revision cycles.
  • Advised clients on system architecture and cost optimization, reducing infrastructure expenses by 20% and improving onboarding experiences.

Personal Project – Lagos, Nigeria

Full Stack Data Engineer

January 2020 – February 2020

  • Built an asynchronous web scraping pipeline that extracted structured data (ratings, cast, reviews) from 50,000+ movie entries.
  • Leveraged aiohttp, asyncio, and BeautifulSoup to parallelize data extraction, cutting scraping time by 75%.
  • Developed a genre-based classification model in scikit-learn using sentiment scores and cast metrics—achieving 85% accuracy.
  • Generated complex data patterns and visualizations with Plotly and Matplotlib to uncover genre trends, user preferences, and engagement shifts.
  • Introduced a dashboard for users to explore categorized movie data and query filters—attracting 200+ users in its first release.

PROJECTS

Dynamic ETL Tool (React + Django + PostgreSQL)

  • Built a fully functional ETL platform with a React frontend and Django backend.
  • Users can extract from databases/APIs/files, apply transformations, and load to destinations.
  • Features include custom condition builders, column mapping, connection manager, and live job tracking.

AI-Powered Data Analytics Dashboard

  • Developed an analytics platform that processes 50,000+ records daily with minimal latency.
  • Implemented interactive visualizations with React and D3.js for complex business metrics.
  • Integrated machine learning models for predictive analytics and anomaly detection.

SQL Visual Query Builder

  • Created a drag-and-drop SQL builder with table relations, graphical joins, and real-time query generation.
  • Integrated with PostgreSQL and displayed results using responsive data tables.
  • Added query optimization suggestions that improved execution plans by 30%.
